verses.text: Tua khit ciangin thu um mi hong tam tektek a, Jew mite leh Grik pau a zang Jew mite kikalah kiphunsanna thu hong om hi. Grik pau a zang Jew mite in, “Annek tuidawn, sumlepai hawmna-ah ka meigong numeite uh hong kipiaksak lo hi,” ci-in lungkimlo uh hi
Tua ahih manin sawltak sawmlenihte in thu um mi khempeuh samin kaikhawm uh a, “Kote in Pasian' thu hilh ding don manlo liangin annek tuidawn sumlepai vai-ah kong manlah ding uh kilawmlo hi
Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, note lak panin pilna leh Kha Siangtho a nei mihing sagih hong kitengkhia un la, hih thute a vaihawm dingin i koih ding hi
Tua hi leh kote in ka hun khempeuh uh thungetna leh thuhilhna-in kong zang thei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi

A vekpi-un sawltakte' thugente thukimpih uh ahih manin, Kha Siangtho tawh kidimin upna a nei Stefen, Filip, Prokhoras, Nikanor, Timon, Parmenas, leh Antiok khua pan Gentail mi ahi Jew biakna a zui Nikolas a teel uh hi
Amaute in sawltakte kiangah hih mite paipih uh a, sawltakte in a lu tung uhah a khut uh nga-in thu a ngetsak uh hi
Tua bangin Pasian' thu kizelin hong khang semsem hi. Jerusalem khuasungah thu um mi tampi tak hong kibehlap a, siampi tampi tak in zong Lungdamna Thu a hong um uh hi.
Pasian in Stefen' tungah thupha tampi tak pia-in vangliatna lianpi neisak a, amah in mite lakah lim leh na lamdang lianpipi a bawl hi

Ahi zongin mi pawlkhat in Stefen langpan' uh hi. Tua mite pen mite in, “Sal Suakta Mite,” a cihte pawl uh hi a, Sairin khua leh Alexandria khua panin a hong pai Jew mite ahi uh hi. Hih Jew mite, Silisia leh Asia gam pan a hong pai Jew mite tawh kipawlin Stefen tawh thu kisel dingin hong kipan uh hi
Ahi zongin Kha Siangtho in Stefen tungah pilna guan' ahih manin amaute in thusel zolo uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in mi cialin sumgolh pia uh a, “Moses leh Pasian langpangin thu a genna ka za uh hi,” cisak uh hi
Amaute in hih bangin zuauna tawh mihonte, upate, leh Thukham hilh siate a holhthawh uh hi. Tua ahih manin amaute hong pai-in Stefen man uh a, uliante mai-ah a hong paipih uh hi
Tua ciangin zuauthu a gen dingin mi pawlkhat hong paipih uh a, “Hih mipa in a siangtho i biakinnpi leh Moses Thukham gensia tawntung hi
Hih Nazareth khuami Jesuh in biakinnpi phelgawpin, Moses tung pek panin a hong kipan ngeina khempeuh khelmang ding hi, ci-in a thuhilhna ka za uh hi,” a cisak uh hi
Ulian kikhopna sunga a kihel mi khempeuh in Stefen en uh a, a maitang pen vantung mi maitang tawh kibang hi, ci-in a mu kim uh hi.
